zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan於1295年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，他的父親Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight36歲，母親Margaret Lindsey34歲。他和Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1391年11月11日在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan于1295年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，他的父亲Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight36岁，母亲Margaret Lindsey34岁。他和Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1391年11月11日在英国苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French muer ‘mewer’, i.e. someone who tended to hawks in the cages in which they were kept while moulting. Compare Mew .

variants.name: Mura
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Akio, Hideo, Masao, Nanako, Tsutomu, Yoshi.  French Alphonse, Amie, Henri.
German: altered form of some similar (like-sounding) German or perhaps French surname. It is also common in France (Alsace), where it was first recorded in the form Morrau, later Murra(w).
Italian (southern Sardinia): topographic name or nickname from Sardinian mura ‘mulberry’ or ‘blackberry’.

variants.name: Muir
meanings: Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived on a moor, from Older Scots muir ‘moor’ (an expanse of bare, wild upland country). There has been some confusion with Mure .

variants.name: Morea
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Saverio, Domenic, Ferdinando, Rocco.  Spanish Manuel, Carlos, Cesar, Elvira, Jesus, Mauricio.

Italian (Apulia): from the personal name Morea, originally a habitational name from Morea, the medieval name of the Greek region of Peloponnese, named as the land of mulberry trees, from mōrea ‘mulberry’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from any of the places called Morea, in Badajoz, Navarre, and Lleida provinces.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan was born in 1295, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, was 36 and his mother, Margaret Lindsey, was 34. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. He died on 11 November 1391, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan est né en 1295, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lindsey, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. Il est décédé le 11 novembre 1391, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan 1295 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight 36 und seine Mutter Margaret Lindsey 34. Er hatte mit Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 11. November 1391 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan è nato il nel 1295 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lindsey, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. Morì il 11 novembre 1391, nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Mure 4th of Rowallanが1295年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knightは36歳，母Margaret Lindseyは34歳であった。彼はLady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellieとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1391年11月11日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan(이)가 1295년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lindsey(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 11월 11일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan nasceu em 1295, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lindsey, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. Ele faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1391, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan родился в 1295 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lindsey, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. Он умер 11 ноября 1391 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Mure 4th of Rowallan nació en 1295, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret Lindsey, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Lady Janet Muir Heiress of Pokellie. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1391, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 96 años.
